MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff SFDD Investments, LLC is present. Represented by Victor Quan.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Able Foy and Edward Foy are present.
Attorney Gino Molinari representing the defendant through fullscope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-16-2012 remains on calendar.
